An attacker can exploit this vulnerability via an email message containing a crafted calendar header, leading to the execution of arbitrary JavaScript code.

entries.name: Srimax Output Messenger Directory Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Srimax Output Messenger contains a directory traversal vulnerability that allows an attacker to access sensitive files outside the intended directory, potentially leading to configuration leakage or arbitrary file access.

entries.name: MDaemon Email Server Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
entries.description: MDaemon Email Server contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to load arbitrary JavaScript code via an HTML e-mail message.

entries.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) Code Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) contains a code injection vulnerability in the API component that allows an authenticated attacker to remotely execute arbitrary code via crafted API requests. This vulnerability results from an insecure implementation of the Hibernate Validator open-source library, as represented by CVE-2025-35036.

entries.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the API component that allows an attacker to access protected resources without proper credentials via crafted API requests. This vulnerability results from an insecure implementation of the Spring Framework open-source library.

entries.name: SAP NetWeaver Deserialization Vulnerability
entries.description: SAP NetWeaver Visual Composer Metadata Uploader contains a deserialization vulnerability that allows a privileged attacker to compromise the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of the host system by deserializing untrusted or malicious content.

entries.name: DrayTek Vigor Routers OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: DrayTek Vigor2960, Vigor300B, and Vigor3900 routers contain an OS command injection vulnerability due to an unknown function of the file /cgi-bin/mainfunction.cgi/apmcfgupload of the component web management interface.

entries.name: Fortinet Multiple Products Stack-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Fortinet FortiFone, FortiVoice, FortiNDR and FortiMail contain a stack-based overflow vulnerability that may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via crafted HTTP requests.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to escalate privileges to administrator.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Scripting Engine Type Confusion Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Scripting Engine contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network via a specially crafted URL.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) Driver Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) Driver contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) Driver Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) Driver contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows DWM Core Library Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows DWM Core Library contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

entries.name: TeleMessage TM SGNL Hidden Functionality Vulnerability
entries.description: TeleMessage TM SGNL contains a hidden functionality vulnerability in which the archiving backend holds cleartext copies of messages from TM SGNL application users.

entries.name: GeoVision Devices OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Multiple GeoVision devices contain an OS command injection vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to inject and execute arbitrary system commands. The impacted products could be end-of-life (EoL) and/or end-of-service (EoS). Users should discontinue product utilization.

entries.name: GeoVision Devices OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Multiple GeoVision devices contain an OS command injection vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to inject and execute arbitrary system commands. The impacted products could be end-of-life (EoL) and/or end-of-service (EoS). Users should discontinue product utilization.

entries.name: FreeType Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
entries.description: FreeType contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability when attempting to parse font subglyph structures related to TrueType GX and variable font files that may allow for arbitrary code execution.

entries.name: Langflow Missing Authentication Vulnerability
entries.description: Langflow contains a missing authentication vulnerability in the /api/v1/validate/code endpoint that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code via crafted HTTP requests.

entries.name: Commvault Command Center Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Commvault Command Center contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code.

entries.name: Yiiframework Yii Improper Protection of Alternate Path Vulnerability
entries.description: Yii Framework contains an improper protection of alternate path vulnerability that may allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code. This vulnerability could affect other products that implement Yii, including—but not limited to—Craft CMS, as represented by CVE-2025-32432.

entries.name: Apache HTTP Server Improper Escaping of Output Vulnerability
entries.description: Apache HTTP Server contains an improper escaping of output vulnerability in mod_rewrite that allows an attacker to map URLs to filesystem locations that are permitted to be served by the server but are not intentionally/directly reachable by any URL, resulting in code execution or source code disclosure.

entries.name: SonicWall SMA100 Appliances OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: SonicWall SMA100 appliances contain an OS command injection vulnerability in the SSL-VPN management interface that allows a remote, authenticated attacker with administrative privilege to inject arbitrary commands as a 'nobody' user.

entries.name: SAP NetWeaver Unrestricted File Upload Vulnerability
entries.description: SAP NetWeaver Visual Composer Metadata Uploader contains an unrestricted file upload vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated agent to upload potentially malicious executable binaries.

entries.name: Broadcom Brocade Fabric OS Code Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Broadcom Brocade Fabric OS contains a code injection vulnerability that allows a local user with administrative privileges to execute arbitrary code with full root privileges.

entries.name: Qualitia Active! Mail Stack-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Qualitia Active! Mail contains a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary or trigger a denial-of-service via a specially crafted request.

entries.name: Commvault Web Server Unspecified Vulnerability
entries.description: Commvault Web Server contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows a remote, authenticated attacker to create and execute webshells.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows NTLM Hash Disclosure Spoofing Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows NTLM contains an external control of file name or path vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

entries.name: Apple Multiple Products Arbitrary Read and Write Vulnerability
entries.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and other Apple products contain an arbitrary read and write vulnerability that allows an attacker to bypass Pointer Authentication.

entries.name: Apple Multiple Products Memory Corruption Vulnerability
entries.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and other Apple products contain a memory corruption vulnerability that allows for code execution when processing an audio stream in a maliciously crafted media file.

entries.name: SonicWall SMA100 Appliances OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: SonicWall SMA100 appliances contain an OS command injection vulnerability in the management interface that allows a remote authenticated attacker to inject arbitrary commands as a 'nobody' user, which could potentially lead to code execution.

entries.name: Linux Kernel Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
entries.description: Linux Kernel contains an out-of-bounds read vulnerability in the USB-audio driver that allows a local, privileged attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information.

entries.name: Linux Kernel Out-of-Bounds Access Vulnerability
entries.description: Linux Kernel contains an out-of-bounds access vulnerability in the USB-audio driver that allows an attacker with physical access to the system to use a malicious USB device to potentially manipulate system memory, escalate privileges, or execute arbitrary code.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) Driver Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) Driver contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

entries.name: Gladinet CentreStack and Triofox Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key Vulnerability
entries.description: Gladinet CentreStack and Triofox contains a use of hard-coded cryptographic key vulnerability in the way that the application manages keys used for ViewState integrity verification. Successful exploitation allows an attacker to forge ViewState payloads for server-side deserialization, allowing for remote code execution.

entries.name: CrushFTP Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: CrushFTP contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the HTTP authorization header that allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to authenticate to any known or guessable user account (e.g., crushadmin), potentially leading to a full compromise.

entries.product: Connect Secure, Policy Secure, and ZTA Gateways
entries.name: Ivanti Connect Secure, Policy Secure, and ZTA Gateways Stack-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Connect Secure, Policy Secure, and ZTA Gateways contains a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution.

entries.name: Apache Tomcat Path Equivalence Vulnerability
entries.description: Apache Tomcat contains a path equivalence vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute code, disclose information, or inject malicious content via a partial PUT request.

entries.name: Cisco Smart Licensing Utility Static Credential Vulnerability
entries.description: Cisco Smart Licensing Utility contains a static credential vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to log in to an affected system and gain administrative credentials.

entries.name: Google Chromium Mojo Sandbox Escape Vulnerability
entries.description: Google Chromium Mojo on Windows contains a sandbox escape vulnerability caused by a logic error, which results from an incorrect handle being provided in unspecified circumstances. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.

entries.name: Sitecore CMS and Experience Platform (XP) Deserialization Vulnerability
entries.description: Sitecore CMS and Experience Platform (XP) contain a deserialization vulnerability in the Sitecore.Security.AntiCSRF module that allows an authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code by sending a serialized .NET object in the HTTP POST parameter __CSRFTOKEN.

entries.name: Sitecore CMS and Experience Platform (XP) Deserialization Vulnerability
entries.description: Sitecore CMS and Experience Platform (XP) contain a deserialization vulnerability in the Sitecore.Security.AntiCSRF module that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code by sending a serialized .NET object in the HTTP POST parameter __CSRFTOKEN.

entries.name: reviewdog/action-setup GitHub Action Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability
entries.description: reviewdog action-setup GitHub Action contains an embedded malicious code vulnerability that dumps exposed secrets to Github Actions Workflow Logs.

entries.name: SAP NetWeaver Directory Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: SAP NetWeaver Application Server (AS) Java contains a directory traversal vulnerability in scheduler/ui/js/ffffffffbca41eb4/UIUtilJavaScriptJS that allows a remote attacker to read arbitrary files via a .. (dot dot) in the query string.

entries.name: NAKIVO Backup and Replication Absolute Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: NAKIVO Backup and Replication contains an absolute path traversal vulnerability that enables an attacker to read arbitrary files.

entries.name: Edimax IC-7100 IP Camera OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Edimax IC-7100 IP camera contains an OS command injection vulnerability due to improper input sanitization that allows an attacker to achieve remote code execution via specially crafted requests. The impacted product could be end-of-life (EoL) and/or end-of-service (EoS). Users should discontinue product utilization.

entries.name: tj-actions/changed-files GitHub Action Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability
entries.description: tj-actions/changed-files GitHub Action contains an embedded malicious code vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to discover secrets by reading Github Actions Workflow Logs. These secrets may include, but are not limited to, valid AWS access keys, GitHub personal access tokens (PATs), npm tokens, and private RSA keys.

entries.name: Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to gain super-admin privileges via crafted CSF proxy requests.

entries.name: Juniper Junos OS Improper Isolation or Compartmentalization Vulnerability
entries.description: Juniper Junos OS contains an improper isolation or compartmentalization vulnerability. This vulnerability could allows a local attacker with high privileges to inject arbitrary code.

entries.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
entries.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and other Apple products contain an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in WebKit that may allow maliciously crafted web content to break out of Web Content sandbox. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows NTFS Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows New Technology File System (NTFS) contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows NTFS Out-Of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows New Technology File System (NTFS) contains an out-of-bounds read vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Fast FAT File System Driver Integer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Fast FAT File System Driver contains an integer overflow or wraparound vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows NTFS Information Disclosure Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows New Technology File System (NTFS) contains an insertion of sensitive Information into log file vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information with a physical attack. An attacker who successfully exploited this vulnerability could potentially read portions of heap memory.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Win32k Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Win32 Kernel Subsystem contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Management Console (MMC) Improper Neutralization Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Management Console (MMC) contains an improper neutralization vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to bypass a security feature locally.

entries.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) Absolute Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) contains an absolute path traversal vulnerability that allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to leak sensitive information.

entries.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) Absolute Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) contains an absolute path traversal vulnerability that allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to leak sensitive information.

entries.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) Absolute Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) contains an absolute path traversal vulnerability that allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to leak sensitive information.

entries.name: Advantive VeraCore Unrestricted File Upload Vulnerability
entries.description: Advantive VeraCore contains an unrestricted file upload vulnerability that allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to upload files to unintended folders via upload.apsx.

entries.name: Advantive VeraCore SQL Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Advantive VeraCore contains a SQL injection vulnerability in timeoutWarning.asp that allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the PmSess1 parameter.

entries.name: VMware ESXi, Workstation, and Fusion Information Disclosure Vulnerability
entries.description: VMware ESXi, Workstation, and Fusion contain an information disclosure vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds read in HGFS. Successful exploitation allows an attacker with administrative privileges to a virtual machine to leak memory from the vmx process.

entries.name: VMware ESXi Arbitrary Write Vulnerability
entries.description: VMware ESXi contains an arbitrary write vulnerability. Successful exploitation allows an attacker with privileges within the VMX process to trigger an arbitrary kernel write leading to an escape of the sandbox.

entries.name: VMware ESXi and Workstation TOCTOU Race Condition Vulnerability
entries.description: VMware ESXi and Workstation contain a time-of-check time-of-use (TOCTOU) race condition vulnerability that leads to an out-of-bounds write. Successful exploitation enables an attacker with local administrative privileges on a virtual machine to execute code as the virtual machine's VMX process running on the host.

entries.name: Linux Kernel Use of Uninitialized Resource Vulnerability
entries.description: The Linux kernel contains a use of uninitialized resource vulnerability that allows an attacker to leak kernel memory via a specially crafted HID report.

entries.name: Progress WhatsUp Gold Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Progress WhatsUp Gold contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Win32k Improper Resource Shutdown or Release Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Win32k contains an improper resource shutdown or release vulnerability that allows for local, authenticated privilege escalation. An attacker who successfully exploited this vulnerability could run arbitrary code in kernel mode.

entries.name: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho BA Server Special Element Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho BA Server contains a special element injection vulnerability that allows an attacker to inject Spring templates into properties files, allowing for arbitrary command execution.

entries.name: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho BA Server Authorization Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho BA Server contains a use of non-canonical URL paths for authorization decisions vulnerability that enables an attacker to bypass authorization.

entries.name: Cisco Small Business RV Series Routers Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Multiple Cisco Small Business RV Series Routers contains a command injection vulnerability in the web-based management interface. Successful exploitation could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to gain root-level privileges and access unauthorized data.

entries.name: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
entries.description: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows a remote authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted script to the /h/autoSaveDraft function.

entries.name: Microsoft Partner Center Improper Access Control Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Partner Center contains an improper access control vulnerability that allows an attacker to escalate privileges.

entries.name: Oracle Agile Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) Deserialization Vulnerability
entries.description: Oracle Agile Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) contains a deserialization vulnerability that allows a low-privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise the system.

entries.name: Adobe ColdFusion Deserialization Vulnerability
entries.description: Adobe ColdFusion contains a deserialization vulnerability in the Apache BlazeDS library that allows for arbitrary code execution.

entries.name: Microsoft Power Pages Improper Access Control Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Power Pages contains an improper access control vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network potentially bypassing the user registration control.

entries.name: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS File Read Vulnerability
entries.description: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an external control of file name or path vulnerability. Successful exploitation enables an authenticated attacker with network access to the management web interface to read files on the PAN-OS filesystem that are readable by the “nobody” user.

entries.name: Craft CMS Code Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Craft CMS contains a code injection vulnerability caused by improper validation of the database backup path, ultimately enabling remote code execution.

entries.name: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in its management web interface. This vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access to the management web interface to bypass the authentication normally required and invoke certain PHP scripts.

entries.name: SonicWall SonicOS SSLVPN Improper Authentication Vulnerability
entries.description: SonicWall SonicOS contains an improper authentication vulnerability in the SSLVPN authentication mechanism that allows a remote attacker to bypass authentication.

entries.name: SimpleHelp Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: SimpleHelp remote support software contains multiple path traversal vulnerabilities that allow unauthenticated remote attackers to download arbitrary files from the SimpleHelp host via crafted HTTP requests. These files may include server configuration files and hashed user passwords.

entries.name: Apple iOS and iPadOS Incorrect Authorization Vulnerability
entries.description: Apple iOS and iPadOS contains an incorrect authorization vulnerability that allows a physical attacker to disable USB Restricted Mode on a locked device.

entries.name: Mitel SIP Phones Argument Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Mitel 6800 Series, 6900 Series, and 6900w Series SIP Phones, including the 6970 Conference Unit, contain an argument injection vulnerability due to insufficient parameter sanitization during the boot process. Successful exploitation may allow an attacker to execute arbitrary commands within the context of the system.

entries.name: Zyxel DSL CPE OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Multiple Zyxel DSL CPE devices contain a post-authentication command injection vulnerability in the management commands that could allow an authenticated attacker to execute OS commands via Telnet.

entries.name: Zyxel DSL CPE OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Multiple Zyxel DSL CPE devices contain a post-authentication command injection vulnerability in the CGI program that could allow an authenticated attacker to execute OS commands via a crafted HTTP request.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation, enabling a local attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Storage Link Following Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Storage contains a link following vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation. This vulnerability could allow an attacker to delete data including data that results in the service being unavailable.

entries.name: Trimble Cityworks Deserialization Vulnerability
entries.description: Trimble Cityworks contains a deserialization vulnerability. This could allow an authenticated user to perform a remote code execution attack against a customer's Microsoft Internet Information Services (IIS) web server.

entries.name: Sophos XG Firewall Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Sophos XG Firewall contains a buffer overflow vulnerability that allows for remote code execution via the "HTTP/S bookmark" feature.

entries.name: CyberoamOS (CROS) SQL Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: CyberoamOS (CROS) contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the WebAdmin that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary SQL statements remotely.

entries.name: Microsoft Outlook Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Outlook contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for remote code execution. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability would allow an attacker to bypass the Office Protected View and open in editing mode rather than protected mode.

entries.name: Dante Discovery Process Control Vulnerability
entries.description: Dante Discovery contains a process control vulnerability in mDNSResponder.exe that all allows for a DLL sideloading attack. A local attacker can leverage this vulnerability in the Dante Application Library to execute arbitrary code.

entries.name: 7-Zip Mark of the Web Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: 7-Zip contains a protection mechanism failure vulnerability that allows remote attackers to bypass the Mark-of-the-Web security feature to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current user.

entries.name: Linux Kernel Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
entries.description: Linux kernel contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the uvc_parse_streaming component of the USB Video Class (UVC) driver that could allow for physical escalation of privilege.

entries.name: Paessler PRTG Network Monitor Local File Inclusion Vulnerability
entries.description: Paessler PRTG Network Monitor contains a local file inclusion vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to create users with read-write privileges (including administrator).

entries.name: Paessler PRTG Network Monitor OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Paessler PRTG Network Monitor contains an OS command injection vulnerability that allows an attacker with administrative privileges to execute commands via the PRTG System Administrator web console.

entries.name: Microsoft .NET Framework Information Disclosure Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft .NET Framework contains an information disclosure vulnerability that exposes the ObjRef URI to an attacker, ultimately enabling remote code execution.

entries.name: Apache OFBiz Forced Browsing Vulnerability
entries.description: Apache OFBiz contains a forced browsing vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to obtain unauthorized access.

entries.name: Apple Multiple Products Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Apple iOS, macOS, and other Apple products contain a user-after-free vulnerability that could allow a malicious application to elevate privileges.

entries.name: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Deserialization Vulnerability
entries.description: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliance Management Console (AMC) and Central Management Console (CMC) contain a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability, which can enable a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary OS commands.

entries.name: JQuery Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
entries.description: JQuery contains a persistent cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability. When passing maliciously formed, untrusted input enclosed in HTML tags, JQuery's DOM manipulators can execute untrusted code in the context of the user's browser.

entries.name: Aviatrix Controllers OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Aviatrix Controllers contain an OS command injection vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code. Shell metacharacters can be sent to /v1/api in cloud_type for list_flightpath_destination_instances, or src_cloud_type for flightpath_connection_test.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Hyper-V NT Kernel Integration VSP Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Hyper-V NT Kernel Integration VSP contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a local attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Hyper-V NT Kernel Integration VSP Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Hyper-V NT Kernel Integration VSP contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a local attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Hyper-V NT Kernel Integration VSP Heap-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Hyper-V NT Kernel Integration VSP contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows a local attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to gain super-admin privileges via crafted requests to Node.js websocket module.

entries.name: Qlik Sense HTTP Tunneling Vulnerability
entries.description: Qlik Sense contains an HTTP tunneling vulnerability that allows an attacker to escalate privileges and execute HTTP requests on the backend server hosting the software.

entries.product: Privileged Remote Access (PRA) and Remote Support (RS)
entries.name: BeyondTrust Privileged Remote Access (PRA) and Remote Support (RS) OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: BeyondTrust Privileged Remote Access (PRA) and Remote Support (RS) contain an OS command injection vulnerability that can be exploited by an attacker with existing administrative privileges to upload a malicious file. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability can allow a remote attacker to execute underlying operating system commands within the context of the site user.

entries.product: Connect Secure, Policy Secure, and ZTA Gateways
entries.name: Ivanti Connect Secure, Policy Secure, and ZTA Gateways Stack-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Connect Secure, Policy Secure, and ZTA Gateways contain a stack-based buffer overflow which can lead to unauthenticated remote code execution.

entries.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Unspecified Vulnerability
entries.description: Oracle WebLogic Server, a product within the Fusion Middleware suite, contains an unspecified vulnerability exploitable by an unauthenticated attacker with network access via IIOP or T3.

entries.name: Mitel MiCollab Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Mitel MiCollab contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated attacker with administrative privileges to read local files within the system due to insufficient input sanitization. This vulnerability can be chained with CVE-2024-41713, which allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to read arbitrary files on the server.

entries.name: Mitel MiCollab Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Mitel MiCollab contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an attacker to gain unauthorized and unauthenticated access. This vulnerability can be chained with CVE-2024-55550, which allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to read arbitrary files on the server.

entries.name: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Malicious DNS Packet Vulnerability
entries.description: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains a vulnerability in parsing and logging malicious DNS packets in the DNS Security feature that, when exploited, allows an unauthenticated attacker to remotely reboot the firewall. Repeated attempts to trigger this condition will cause the firewall to enter maintenance mode.

entries.name: Acclaim Systems USAHERDS Use of Hard-Coded Credentials Vulnerability
entries.description: Acclaim Systems USAHERDS contains a hard-coded credentials vulnerability that could allow an attacker to achieve remote code execution on the system that runs the application. The MachineKey must be obtained via a separate vulnerability or other channel.

entries.product: Privileged Remote Access (PRA) and Remote Support (RS)
entries.name: BeyondTrust Privileged Remote Access (PRA) and Remote Support (RS) Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: BeyondTrust Privileged Remote Access (PRA) and Remote Support (RS) contain a command injection vulnerability, which can allow an unauthenticated attacker to inject commands that are run as a site user.

entries.name: Reolink RLC-410W IP Camera OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Reolink RLC-410W IP cameras contain an authenticated OS command injection vulnerability in the device network settings functionality.

entries.name: Reolink Multiple IP Cameras OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Reolink RLC-410W, C1 Pro, C2 Pro, RLC-422W, and RLC-511W IP cameras contain an authenticated OS command injection vulnerability. This vulnerability allows an authenticated admin to use the "TestEmail" functionality to inject and run OS commands as root.

entries.name: NUUO NVRmini2 Devices Missing Authentication Vulnerability
entries.description: NUUO NVRmini2 devices contain a missing authentication vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to upload an encrypted TAR archive, which can be abused to add arbitrary users.

entries.name: NUUO NVRmini Devices OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: NUUO NVRmini devices contain an OS command injection vulnerability. This vulnerability allows remote command execution via shell metacharacters in the uploaddir parameter for a writeuploaddir command.

entries.name: Cleo Multiple Products Unauthenticated File Upload Vulnerability
entries.description: Cleo Harmony, VLTrader, and LexiCom, which are managed file transfer products, contain an unrestricted file upload vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated user to import and execute arbitrary bash or PowerShell commands on the host system by leveraging the default settings of the Autorun directory.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Kernel-Mode Driver Untrusted Pointer Dereference Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Kernel-Mode Driver contains an untrusted pointer dereference vulnerability that allows a local attacker to escalate privileges.

entries.name: Adobe ColdFusion Improper Access Control Vulnerability
entries.description: Adobe ColdFusion contains an improper access control vulnerability that could allow an attacker to access or modify restricted files via an internet-exposed admin panel.

entries.name: Cleo Multiple Products Unrestricted File Upload Vulnerability
entries.description: Cleo Harmony, VLTrader, and LexiCom, which are managed file transfer products, contain an unrestricted file upload and download vulnerability that can lead to remote code execution with elevated privileges.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) Driver Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) driver contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows a local attacker to escalate privileges.

entries.name: CyberPanel Incorrect Default Permissions Vulnerability
entries.description: CyberPanel contains an incorrect default permissions vulnerability that allows for authentication bypass and the execution of arbitrary commands using shell metacharacters in the statusfile property.

entries.name: Zyxel Multiple Firewalls Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Multiple Zyxel firewalls contain a path traversal vulnerability in the web management interface that could allow an attacker to download or upload files via a crafted URL.

entries.name: ProjectSend Improper Authentication Vulnerability
entries.description: ProjectSend contains an improper authentication vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to enable unauthorized modification of the application's configuration via crafted HTTP requests to options.php. Successful exploitation allows attackers to create accounts, upload webshells, and embed malicious JavaScript.

entries.name: North Grid Proself Improper Restriction of XML External Entity (XXE) Reference Vulnerability
entries.description: North Grid Proself Enterprise/Standard, Gateway, and Mail Sanitize contain an improper restriction of XML External Entity (XXE) reference vulnerability, which could allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to conduct an XXE attack.

entries.name: Array Networks AG and vxAG ArrayOS Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
entries.description: Array Networks AG and vxAG ArrayOS contain a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability that allows an attacker to read local files and execute code on the SSL VPN gateway.

entries.name: Oracle Agile Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) Incorrect Authorization Vulnerability
entries.description: Oracle Agile Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) contains an incorrect authorization vulnerability in the Process Extension component of the Software Development Kit. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may result in unauthenticated file disclosure.

entries.name: Apple Multiple Products Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
entries.description: Apple iOS, macOS, and other Apple products contain an unspecified vulnerability when processing maliciously crafted web content that may lead to a cross-site scripting (XSS) attack.

entries.name: Apple Multiple Products Code Execution Vulnerability
entries.description: Apple iOS, macOS, and other Apple products contain an unspecified vulnerability when processing maliciously crafted web content that may lead to arbitrary code execution.

entries.name: VMware vCenter Server Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: VMware vCenter contains an improper check for dropped privileges vulnerability. This vulnerability could allow an attacker with network access to the vCenter Server to escalate privileges to root by sending a specially crafted packet.

entries.name: VMware vCenter Server Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: VMware vCenter Server contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the implementation of the DCERPC protocol. This vulnerability could allow an attacker with network access to the vCenter Server to execute remote code by sending a specially crafted packet.

entries.name: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Management Interface OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an OS command injection vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation through the web-based management interface for several PAN products, including firewalls and VPN concentrators.

entries.name: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Management Interface Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the web-based management interface for several PAN-OS products, including firewalls and VPN concentrators.

entries.name: Progress Kemp LoadMaster OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Progress Kemp LoadMaster contains an OS command injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to access the system through the LoadMaster management interface, enabling arbitrary system command execution.

entries.name: Palo Alto Networks Expedition SQL Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Palo Alto Networks Expedition contains a SQL injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to reveal Expedition database contents, such as password hashes, usernames, device configurations, and device API keys. With this, attackers can also create and read arbitrary files on the Expedition system.

entries.name: Palo Alto Networks Expedition OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Palo Alto Networks Expedition contains an OS command injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to run arbitrary OS commands as root in Expedition, resulting in disclosure of usernames, cleartext passwords, device configurations, and device API keys of PAN-OS firewalls.

entries.name: Atlassian Jira Server and Data Center Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Atlassian Jira Server and Data Center contain a path traversal vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to read particular files in the /WEB-INF/web.xml endpoint.

entries.name: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
entries.description: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the WebVPN login page. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via an unspecified parameter.

entries.name: Metabase GeoJSON API Local File Inclusion Vulnerability
entries.description: Metabase contains a local file inclusion vulnerability in the custom map support in the API to read GeoJSON formatted data.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows NTLMv2 Hash Disclosure Spoofing Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows contains an NTLMv2 hash spoofing vulnerability that could result in disclosing a user's NTLMv2 hash to an attacker via a file open operation. The attacker could then leverage this hash to impersonate that user.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Task Scheduler Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Task Scheduler contains a privilege escalation vulnerability that can allow an attacker-provided, local application to escalate privileges outside of its AppContainer, and access privileged RPC functions.

entries.name: Nostromo nhttpd Directory Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Nostromo nhttpd contains a directory traversal vulnerability in the http_verify() function in a non-chrooted nhttpd server allowing for remote code execution.

entries.name: CyberPanel Incorrect Default Permissions Vulnerability
entries.description: CyberPanel contains an incorrect default permissions vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute commands as root.

entries.name: Android Framework Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Android Framework contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation.

entries.name: Palo Alto Networks Expedition Missing Authentication Vulnerability
entries.description: Palo Alto Networks Expedition contains a missing authentication vulnerability that allows an attacker with network access to takeover an Expedition admin account and potentially access configuration secrets, credentials, and other data.

entries.name: PTZOptics PT30X-SDI/NDI Cameras Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: PTZOptics PT30X-SDI/NDI cameras contain an insecure direct object reference (IDOR) vulnerability that allows a remote, attacker to bypass authentication for the /cgi-bin/param.cgi CGI script. If combined with CVE-2024-8957, this can lead to remote code execution as root.

entries.name: PTZOptics PT30X-SDI/NDI Cameras OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: PTZOptics PT30X-SDI/NDI cameras contain an OS command injection vulnerability that allows a remote, authenticated attacker to escalate privileges to root via a crafted payload with the ntp_addr parameter of the /cgi-bin/param.cgi CGI script.

entries.name: RoundCube Webmail Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
entries.description: RoundCube Webmail contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the handling of SVG animate attributes that allows a remote attacker to run malicious JavaScript code.

entries.product: Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD)
entries.name: Cisco ASA and FTD Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
entries.description: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) contain a missing release of resource after effective lifetime vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to cause a denial-of-service (DoS) of the RAVPN service.

entries.name: Fortinet FortiManager Missing Authentication Vulnerability
entries.description: Fortinet FortiManager contains a missing authentication vulnerability in the fgfmd daemon that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specially crafted requests.

entries.name: Microsoft SharePoint Deserialization Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization vulnerability that allows for remote code execution.

entries.name: ScienceLogic SL1 Unspecified Vulnerability
entries.description: ScienceLogic SL1 (formerly EM7) is affected by an unspecified vulnerability involving an unspecified third-party component.

entries.name: Veeam Backup and Replication Deserialization Vulnerability
entries.description: Veeam Backup and Replication contains a deserialization vulnerability allowing an unauthenticated user to perform remote code execution.

entries.name: SolarWinds Web Help Desk Hardcoded Credential Vulnerability
entries.description: SolarWinds Web Help Desk contains a hardcoded credential vulnerability that could allow a remote, unauthenticated user to access internal functionality and modify data.

entries.name: Mozilla Firefox Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Mozilla Firefox and Firefox ESR contain a use-after-free vulnerability in Animation timelines that allows for code execution in the content process.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Kernel TOCTOU Race Condition Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Kernel contains a time-of-check to time-of-use (TOCTOU) race condition vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation.

entries.name: Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance (CSA) OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance (CSA) contains an OS command injection vulnerability in the administrative console which can allow an authenticated attacker with application admin privileges to pass commands to the underlying OS.

entries.name: Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance (CSA) SQL Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance (CSA) contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the admin web console in versions prior to 5.0.2, which can allow a remote attacker authenticated as administrator to run arbitrary SQL statements.

entries.name: Fortinet Multiple Products Format String Vulnerability
entries.description: Fortinet FortiOS, FortiPAM, FortiProxy, and FortiWeb contain a format string vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specially crafted requests.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform Spoofing Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform contains an unspecified spoofing vulnerability which can lead to a loss of confidentiality.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Management Console Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Management Console contains unspecified vulnerability that allows for remote code execution.

entries.name: Qualcomm Multiple Chipsets Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Multiple Qualcomm chipsets contain a use-after-free vulnerability due to memory corruption in DSP Services while maintaining memory maps of HLOS memory.

entries.name: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Command Execution Vulnerability
entries.description: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains an unspecified vulnerability in the postjournal service that may allow an unauthenticated user to execute commands.

entries.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) SQL Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) contains a SQL injection vulnerability in Core server that allows an unauthenticated attacker within the same network to execute arbitrary code.

entries.name: SAP Commerce Cloud Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
entries.description: SAP Commerce Cloud (formerly known as Hybris) contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability within the mediaconversion and virtualjdbc extension that allows for code injection.

entries.name: DrayTek Multiple Vigor Routers OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: DrayTek Vigor3900, Vigor2960, and Vigor300B devices contain an OS command injection vulnerability in cgi-bin/mainfunction.cgi/cvmcfgupload that allows for remote code execution via shell metacharacters in a filename when the text/x-python-script content type is used.

entries.name: D-Link DIR-820 Router OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: D-Link DIR-820 routers contain an OS command injection vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to escalate privileges to root via a crafted payload with the ping_addr parameter to ping.ccp.

entries.name: Ivanti Virtual Traffic Manager Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Virtual Traffic Manager contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to create a chosen administrator account.

entries.name: Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance (CSA) Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance (CSA) contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to access restricted functionality. If CVE-2024-8963 is used in conjunction with CVE-2024-8190, an attacker could bypass admin authentication and execute arbitrary commands on the appliance.

entries.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
entries.description: Oracle WebLogic Server, a product within the Fusion Middleware suite, contains a deserialization vulnerability. Unauthenticated attackers with network access via T3 or IIOP can exploit this vulnerability to achieve remote code execution.

entries.name: Oracle ADF Faces Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
entries.description: Oracle ADF Faces library, included with Oracle JDeveloper Distribution, contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability leading to unauthenticated remote code execution.

entries.name: Microsoft SQL Server Reporting Services Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft SQL Server Reporting Services contains a deserialization vulnerability when handling page requests incorrectly. An authenticated attacker can exploit this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the Report Server service account.

entries.name: Apache HugeGraph-Server Improper Access Control Vulnerability
entries.description: Apache HugeGraph-Server contains an improper access control vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code.

entries.name: Adobe Flash Player Double Free Vulnerablity
entries.description: Adobe Flash Player contains a double free vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code.

entries.name: Adobe Flash Player Code Execution Vulnerability
entries.description: Adobe Flash Player contains an unspecified vulnerability in the ExternalInterface ActionScript functionality that allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via crafted SWF content.

entries.name: Adobe Flash Player Incorrect Default Permissions Vulnerability
entries.description: Adobe Flash Player contains an incorrect default permissions vulnerability in the Firefox sandbox that allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via crafted SWF content.

entries.name: Adobe Flash Player Integer Underflow Vulnerablity
entries.description: Adobe Flash Player contains an integer underflow vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code.

entries.name: Progress WhatsUp Gold SQL Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Progress WhatsUp Gold contains a SQL injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to retrieve the user's encrypted password if the application is configured with only a single user.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform Spoofing Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform contains a user interface (UI) misrepresentation of critical information vulnerability that allows an attacker to spoof a web page. This vulnerability was exploited in conjunction with CVE-2024-38112.

entries.name: Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance (CSA) contains an OS command injection vulnerability in the administrative console which can allow an authenticated attacker with application admin privileges to pass commands to the underlying OS.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Mark of the Web (MOTW) Protection Mechanism Failure Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Mark of the Web (MOTW) contains a protection mechanism failure vulnerability that allows an attacker to bypass MOTW-based defenses. This can result in a limited loss of integrity and availability of security features such as Protected View in Microsoft Office, which rely on MOTW tagging.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Installer Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Installer contains an improper privilege management vulnerability that could allow an attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Microsoft Publisher Protection Mechanism Failure Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Publisher contains a protection mechanism failure vulnerability that allows attacker to bypass Office macro policies used to block untrusted or malicious files.

entries.name: SonicWall SonicOS Improper Access Control Vulnerability
entries.description: SonicWall SonicOS contains an improper access control vulnerability that could lead to unauthorized resource access and, under certain conditions, may cause the firewall to crash.

entries.name: Linux Kernel PIE Stack Buffer Corruption Vulnerability
entries.description: Linux kernel contains a position-independent executable (PIE) stack buffer corruption vulnerability in load_elf_ binary() that allows a local attacker to escalate privileges.

entries.name: ImageMagick Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
entries.description: ImageMagick contains an improper input validation vulnerability that affects the EPHEMERAL, HTTPS, MVG, MSL, TEXT, SHOW, WIN, and PLT coders. This allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via shell metacharacters in a crafted image.

entries.name: Kingsoft WPS Office Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Kingsoft WPS Office contains a path traversal vulnerability in promecefpluginhost.exe on Windows that allows an attacker to load an arbitrary Windows library.

entries.name: Draytek VigorConnect Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Draytek VigorConnect contains a path traversal vulnerability in the file download functionality of the WebServlet endpoint. An unauthenticated attacker could leverage this vulnerability to download arbitrary files from the underlying operating system with root privileges.

entries.name: Draytek VigorConnect Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Draytek VigorConnect contains a path traversal vulnerability in the DownloadFileServlet endpoint. An unauthenticated attacker could leverage this vulnerability to download arbitrary files from the underlying operating system with root privileges.

entries.name: Google Chromium V8 Inappropriate Implementation Vulnerability
entries.description: Google Chromium V8 contains an inappropriate implementation vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.

entries.name: Apache OFBiz Incorrect Authorization Vulnerability
entries.description: Apache OFBiz contains an incorrect authorization vulnerability that could allow remote code execution via a Groovy payload in the context of the OFBiz user process by an unauthenticated attacker.

entries.name: Google Chromium V8 Type Confusion Vulnerability
entries.description: Google Chromium V8 contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.

entries.name: Versa Director Dangerous File Type Upload Vulnerability
entries.description: The Versa Director GUI contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows administrators with Provider-Data-Center-Admin or Provider-Data-Center-System-Admin privileges to customize the user interface. The “Change Favicon” (Favorite Icon) enables the upload of a .png file, which can be exploited to upload a malicious file with a .png extension disguised as an image.

entries.name: Microsoft Exchange Server Information Disclosure Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Exchange Server contains an information disclosure vulnerability that allows for remote code execution.

entries.name: Linux Kernel Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
entries.description: Linux kernel contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the legacy_parse_param function in the Filesystem Context functionality. This allows an attacker to open a filesystem that does not support the Filesystem Context API and ultimately escalate privileges.

entries.name: Dahua IP Camera Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Dahua IP cameras and related products contain an authentication bypass vulnerability when the loopback device is specified by the client during authentication.

entries.name: Dahua IP Camera Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Dahua IP cameras and related products contain an authentication bypass vulnerability when the NetKeyboard type argument is specified by the client during authentication.

entries.name: Jenkins Command Line Interface (CLI) Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Jenkins Command Line Interface (CLI) contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows attackers limited read access to certain files, which can lead to code execution.

entries.name: SolarWinds Web Help Desk Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
entries.description: SolarWinds Web Help Desk contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Power Dependency Coordinator Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Power Dependency Coordinator contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation, enabling a local attacker to obtain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Kernel Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Kernel contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation, enabling a local attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability requires an attacker to win a race condition.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation, enabling a local attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker to bypass the SmartScreen user experience via a malicious file.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Scripting Engine Memory Corruption Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Scripting Engine contains a memory corruption vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attacker to initiate remote code execution via a specially crafted URL.

entries.name: Microsoft Project Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Project contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for remote code execution via a malicious file.

entries.name: Apache OFBiz Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: Apache OFBiz contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution.

entries.name: Android Kernel Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
entries.description: Android contains an unspecified vulnerability in the kernel that allows for remote code execution. This vulnerability resides in Linux Kernel and could impact other products, including but not limited to Android OS.

entries.name: Microsoft COM for Windows Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft COM for Windows contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation and remote code execution via a specially crafted file or script.

entries.name: VMware ESXi Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: VMware ESXi contains an authentication bypass vulnerability. A malicious actor with sufficient Active Directory (AD) permissions can gain full access to an ESXi host that was previously configured to use AD for user management by re-creating the configured AD group ('ESXi Admins' by default) after it was deleted from AD.

entries.name: Acronis Cyber Infrastructure (ACI) Insecure Default Password Vulnerability
entries.description: Acronis Cyber Infrastructure (ACI) allows an unauthenticated user to execute commands remotely due to the use of default passwords.

entries.product: Utah, Vancouver, and Washington DC Now Platform
entries.name: ServiceNow Incomplete List of Disallowed Inputs Vulnerability
entries.description: ServiceNow Washington DC, Vancouver, and earlier Now Platform releases contain an incomplete list of disallowed inputs vulnerability in the GlideExpression script. An unauthenticated user could exploit this vulnerability to execute code remotely.

entries.product: Utah, Vancouver, and Washington DC Now Platform
entries.name: ServiceNow Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
entries.description: ServiceNow Utah, Vancouver, and Washington DC Now Platform releases contain a jelly template injection vulnerability in UI macros. An unauthenticated user could exploit this vulnerability to execute code remotely.

entries.name: Twilio Authy Information Disclosure Vulnerability
entries.description: Twilio Authy contains an information disclosure vulnerability in its API that allows an unauthenticated endpoint to accept a request containing a phone number and respond with information about whether the phone number was registered with Authy.

entries.name: Microsoft Internet Explorer Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Internet Explorer contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted web site that triggers access to an object that (1) was not properly allocated or (2) is deleted, as demonstrated by a CDwnBindInfo object.

entries.name: VMware vCenter Server Incorrect Default File Permissions Vulnerability
entries.description: VMware vCenter Server contains an incorrect default file permissions vulnerability that allows a remote, privileged attacker to gain access to sensitive information.

entries.name: SolarWinds Serv-U Path Traversal Vulnerability
entries.description: SolarWinds Serv-U contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows an attacker access to read sensitive files on the host machine.

entries.name: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference (XXE) Vulnerability
entries.description: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source contain an improper restriction of XML external entity reference (XXE) vulnerability that allows for remote code execution.

entries.name: OSGeo GeoServer GeoTools Eval Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: OSGeo GeoServer GeoTools contains an improper neutralization of directives in dynamically evaluated code vulnerability due to unsafely evaluating property names as XPath expressions. This allows unauthenticated attackers to conduct remote code execution via specially crafted input.

entries.name: Rejetto HTTP File Server Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine Vulnerability
entries.description: Rejetto HTTP File Server contains an improper neutralization of special elements used in a template engine vulnerability. This allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute commands on the affected system by sending a specially crafted HTTP request.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Hyper-V Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Hyper-V contains a privilege escalation vulnerability that allows a local attacker with user permissions to gain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform Spoofing Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform contains a spoofing vulnerability that has a high impact to confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

entries.name: Cisco NX-OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Cisco NX-OS contains a command injection vulnerability in the command line interface (CLI) that could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute commands as root on the underlying operating system of an affected device.

entries.name: Roundcube Webmail Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
entries.description: Roundcube Webmail contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to manipulate data via a malicious XML attachment.

entries.name: Linux Kernel Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Linux Kernel contains a use-after-free vulnerability in the nft_object, allowing local attackers to escalate privileges.

entries.name: OSGeo GeoServer JAI-EXT Code Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: OSGeo GeoServer JAI-EXT contains a code injection vulnerability that, when programs use jt-jiffle and allow Jiffle script to be provided via network request, could allow remote code execution.

entries.name: Progress Telerik Report Server Authentication Bypass by Spoofing Vulnerability
entries.description: Progress Telerik Report Server contains an authorization bypass by spoofing vulnerability that allows an attacker to obtain unauthorized access.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Error Reporting Service Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Error Reporting Service contains an improper privilege management vulnerability that allows a local attacker with user permissions to gain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Android Pixel Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Android Pixel contains an unspecified vulnerability in the firmware that allows for privilege escalation.

entries.name: PHP-CGI OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: PHP, specifically Windows-based PHP used in CGI mode, contains an OS command injection vulnerability that allows for arbitrary code execution. This vulnerability is a patch bypass for CVE-2012-1823.

entries.name: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Arm Bifrost and Valhall GPU kernel drivers contain a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a local, non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations to gain access to already freed memory.

entries.name: Oracle WebLogic Server OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Oracle WebLogic Server, a product within the Fusion Middleware suite, contains an OS command injection vulnerability that allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code via a specially crafted HTTP request that includes a malicious XML document.

entries.name: Linux Kernel Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Linux kernel contains a use-after-free vulnerability in the netfilter: nf_tables component that allows an attacker to achieve local privilege escalation.

entries.name: Check Point Quantum Security Gateways Information Disclosure Vulnerability
entries.description: Check Point Quantum Security Gateways contain an unspecified information disclosure vulnerability. The vulnerability potentially allows an attacker to access information on Gateways connected to the internet, with IPSec VPN, Remote Access VPN or Mobile Access enabled. This issue affects several product lines from Check Point, including CloudGuard Network, Quantum Scalable Chassis, Quantum Security Gateways, and Quantum Spark Appliances.

entries.name: Justice AV Solutions (JAVS) Viewer Installer Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability
entries.description: Justice AV Solutions (JAVS) Viewer installer contains a malicious version of ffmpeg.exe, named fffmpeg.exe (SHA256: 421a4ad2615941b177b6ec4ab5e239c14e62af2ab07c6df1741e2a62223223c4). When run, this creates a backdoor connection to a malicious C2 server.

entries.name: Google Chromium V8 Type Confusion Vulnerability
entries.description: Google Chromium V8 contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute code via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.

entries.name: Apache Flink Improper Access Control Vulnerability
entries.description: Apache Flink contains an improper access control vulnerability that allows an attacker to read any file on the local filesystem of the JobManager through its REST interface.

entries.name: Google Chromium V8 Type Confusion Vulnerability
entries.description: Google Chromium V8 contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute code via a crafted HTML page.

entries.name: NextGen Healthcare Mirth Connect Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
entries.description: NextGen Healthcare Mirth Connect contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows for unauthenticated remote code execution via a specially crafted request.

entries.name: Google Chromium V8 Out-of-Bounds Memory Write Vulnerability
entries.description: Google Chromium V8 Engine contains an unspecified out-of-bounds memory write vulnerability via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.

entries.name: D-Link DIR-605 Router Information Disclosure Vulnerability
entries.description: D-Link DIR-605 routers contain an information disclosure vulnerability that allows attackers to obtain a username and password by forging a post request to the /getcfg.php page.

entries.name: D-Link DIR-600 Router Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) Vulnerability
entries.description: D-Link DIR-600 routers contain a cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability that allows an attacker to change router configurations by hijacking an existing administrator session.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for a security feature bypass.

entries.name: Microsoft DWM Core Library Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft DWM Core Library contains a privilege escalation vulnerability that allows an attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.

entries.name: Google Chromium Visuals Use-After-Free Vulnerability
entries.description: Google Chromium Visuals contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.

entries.name: GitLab Community and Enterprise Editions Improper Access Control Vulnerability
entries.description: GitLab Community and Enterprise Editions contain an improper access control vulnerability. This allows an attacker to trigger password reset emails to be sent to an unverified email address to ultimately facilitate an account takeover.

entries.name: Microsoft SmartScreen Prompt Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft SmartScreen Prompt contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker to bypass the Mark of the Web (MotW) feature. This vulnerability can be chained with CVE-2023-38831 and CVE-2024-21412 to execute a malicious file.

entries.name: CrushFTP VFS Sandbox Escape Vulnerability
entries.description: CrushFTP contains an unspecified sandbox escape vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to escape the CrushFTP virtual file system (VFS).

entries.product: Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD)
entries.name: Cisco ASA and FTD Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) contain a privilege escalation vulnerability that can allow local privilege escalation from Administrator to root.

entries.product: Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD)
entries.name: Cisco ASA and FTD Denial of Service Vulnerability
entries.description: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) contain an infinite loop vulnerability that can lead to remote denial of service condition.

entries.name: Microsoft Windows Print Spooler Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft Windows Print Spooler service contains a privilege escalation vulnerability. An attacker may modify a JavaScript constraints file and execute it with SYSTEM-level permissions.

entries.name: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS GlobalProtect feature contains a command injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute commands with root privileges on the firewall.

entries.name: D-Link Multiple NAS Devices Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: D-Link DNS-320L, DNS-325, DNS-327L, and DNS-340L contain a command injection vulnerability. When combined with CVE-2024-3272, this can lead to remote, unauthorized code execution.

entries.name: D-Link Multiple NAS Devices Use of Hard-Coded Credentials Vulnerability
entries.description: D-Link DNS-320L, DNS-325, DNS-327L, and DNS-340L contains a hard-coded credential that allows an attacker to conduct authenticated command injection, leading to remote, unauthorized code execution.

entries.name: Android Pixel Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
entries.description: Android Pixel contains a privilege escalation vulnerability that allows an attacker to interrupt a factory reset triggered by a device admin app.

entries.name: Android Pixel Information Disclosure Vulnerability
entries.description: Android Pixel contains an information disclosure vulnerability in the fastboot firmware used to support unlocking, flashing, and locking affected devices.

entries.name: Microsoft SharePoint Server Code Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains a code injection vulnerability that allows an authenticated attacker with Site Owner privileges to execute code remotely.

entries.name: Nice Linear eMerge E3-Series OS Command Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Nice Linear eMerge E3-Series contains an OS command injection vulnerability that allows an attacker to conduct remote code execution.

entries.product: Endpoint Manager Cloud Service Appliance (EPM CSA)
entries.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Cloud Service Appliance (EPM CSA) Code Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Cloud Service Appliance (EPM CSA) contains a code injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated user to execute malicious code with limited permissions (nobody).

entries.name: Fortinet FortiClient EMS SQL Injection Vulnerability
entries.description: Fortinet FortiClient EMS contains a SQL injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute commands as SYSTEM via specifically crafted requests.

entries.name: JetBrains TeamCity Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entries.description: JetBrains TeamCity contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker to perform admin actions.

entries.name: Apple Multiple Products Memory Corruption Vulnerability
entries.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, and visionOS kernel contain a memory corruption vulnerability that allows an attacker with arbitrary kernel read and write capability to bypass kernel memory protections.

entries.name: Apple Multiple Products Memory Corruption Vulnerability
entries.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and watchOS RTKit contain a memory corruption vulnerability that allows an attacker with arbitrary kernel read and write capability to bypass kernel memory protections.

entries.name: Android Pixel Information Disclosure Vulnerability
entries.description: Android Pixel contains a vulnerability in the Framework component, where the UI may be misleading or insufficient, providing a means to hide a foreground service notification. This could enable a local attacker to disclose sensitive information.
